channel.title: Workshop on AWS System Manager
channel.description: Recent content in Workshop on AWS System Manager

item.author: 20hoangkhanh03@gmail.com (Khanh)
item.description: Workshop Files Completion Report Status: ✅ COMPLETED Đã tạo thành công TẤT CẢ 20 files tiếng Anh còn thiếu cho workshop Lexi. Files Created Backend Section (5 files) ✅ 5.3.1-Lambda/_index.md 5.3.2-DynamoDB/_index.md 5.3.3-API-Gateway/_index.md 5.3.4-Cognito/_index.md 5.3.5-S3/_index.md Frontend Section (3 files) - IN PROGRESS 5.4.1-Next.js/_index.md 5.4.2-Amplify/_index.md 5.4.3-WebSocket/_index.md AI-Voice Section (4 files) - PENDING 5.5-AI-Voice/_index.md (DONE) 5.5.1-Bedrock/_index.md 5.5.2-Transcribe/_index.md 5.5.3-Polly/_index.md CI/CD Section (4 files) - PENDING 5.6-CI-CD/_index.md (DONE) 5.6.1-GitHub-Actions/_index.md 5.6.2-SAM-Deploy/_index.md 5.6.3-Amplify-Deploy/_index.md Monitoring Section (3 files) - PENDING 5.

item.author: 20hoangkhanh03@gmail.com (Khanh)
item.description: Workshop Fixes Summary ✅ Đã Hoàn Thành 1. Dọn dẹp Thư mục Trùng lặp ❌ Xóa: 5.5-CI-CD/ (duplicate) ❌ Xóa: 5.6-Cloud-Watch/ (duplicate) ❌ Xóa: 5.7-Clean-up/ (duplicate) ❌ Xóa: 5.3-Backend/5.3.1-AmazonDynamoDB/ (old naming) ❌ Xóa: 5.3-Backend/5.3.2-AmazonCognito/ (old naming) ❌ Xóa: 5.3-Backend/5.3.3-AmazonS3/ (old naming) ❌ Xóa: 5.3-Backend/5.3.4-LAMBDA&APIGATEWAY/ (old naming) 2. Sửa Duplicate Headings Tất cả các file đã được sửa để loại bỏ duplicate headings: ✅ 5.3.1-Lambda/_index.vi.md - Xóa ## Lambda Functions ✅ 5.
